title: Bibliocraft Legacy
description: Bibliocraft Legacy is a port of the original BiblioCraft Minecraft mod by Nuchaz. It adds various pieces of decorative and functional furniture into the game.
body:
Bibliocraft Legacy is a remake of the original [BiblioCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft) mod by Nuchaz. What began way back in 1.4.7 with a single bookcase is now back in Minecraft 1.21.1+, rewritten from the ground up and with updated and more vanilla-friendly models.

# Table of Contents

*   Various decorative and functional pieces of furniture that each have their own unique use, such as:
    *   Bookcases
    *   Fancy Armor Stands
    *   Fancy Clocks
    *   Fancy Crafters
    *   Fancy Signs
    *   Grandfather Clocks
    *   Labels
    *   Potion Shelves
    *   Shelves
    *   Tables
    *   Tool Racks
    *   Display Cases
    *   Seats with multiple types of Seat Backs
    *   Fancy Lamps and Lanterns in several variants
    *   Cookie Jars
    *   Desk Bells
    *   Dinner Plates
    *   Disc Racks
    *   Sword Pedestals
    *   Golden Chains, Lanterns and Soul Lanterns
*   Items to help you with organization, such as:
    *   Big Books
    *   Clipboards
    *   Stockroom Catalogs
    *   Tape Measures
*   Vanilla friendly JSON models, replacing the old out-of-place OBJ 3D models
*   Wooden blocks come in all vanilla wood types (11 as of 1.21.1)
*   Support for over 100 different wood types from over 20 different mods is available via the [Bibliowoods Legacy](https://www.modrinth.com/project/bibliowoods-legacy) and [Bibliobiomes Legacy](https://www.modrinth.com/minecraft/project/bibliobiomes-legacy) addon mods
*   Compatible with most resource packs, all wooden blocks use vanilla textures only
*   Offers an API for other mods to easily add support for their wood types
*   Performance and modpack friendly

# Planned Features

Not every feature of the old mod is in yet, however I plan to add pretty much everything. Notable missing features include:

*   Everything related to mapping (Map Frames, Atlases, Drafting Compasses)
*   Everything related to painting (Painting Frames, Painting Presses, Painting Canvases)
*   Some other small things

# Support

This mod currently supports NeoForge for 1.21.1 and upwards. There are no current plans to port to Fabric, Forge, Quilt, or any other loader. There are also no plans to backport to versions older than 1.21.1.

If you need help with using the mod, or just want to chat, feel free to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/jSnHGFBX2k)!
